vision_profile.current_state: Karan is a QA Automation Engineer with 5 years of experience, proficient in Java, Selenium, and basic Jenkins, looking to elevate his role.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is transitioning from automation scripting to designing robust test frameworks, integrating CI/CD, and mastering backend/performance testing.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to ensure QA is recognized as a critical engineering discipline and to avoid repetitive automation work by deepening his architectural and backend testing skills.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can design and implement well-structured, maintainable test automation scripts using advanced Python and core OOP principles, and apply fundamental testing methodologies.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a strong engineering foundation, transforming from a script-runner to a thoughtful test developer.

science.desc: You are given a failing Python test script for a web application. Identify the root cause of the failure and propose a robust fix using Pythonic best practices.

modules.title: OOP & SOLID Principles for Testability
lessons: Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism in Test Code
Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) in Test Classes
Liskov Substitution Principle (LSP) for Test Doubles
Interface Segregation Principle (ISP) for Test Interfaces
Dependency Inversion Principle (DIP) & IoC for Test Setup

video.title: OOP Review & Application in Test Automation
Applying SRP and OCP to Test Frameworks

scenario.title: Designing an Extensible Page Object Model

skills.title: Basic Design Patterns for Test Automation

scenario.title: Implementing a Builder Pattern for Test Data

video.title: Optimizing Test Coverage with Test Pyramid

science.desc: Explain the concept of the Test Pyramid and how you would apply it to a new project to optimize testing efforts and feedback loops.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can design and implement scalable, maintainable, and extensible test automation frameworks, including advanced API contract testing and data-driven approaches.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into an architect of quality, crafting the very tools that ensure software excellence.

science.desc: Describe how you would design a test automation framework from scratch for a complex e-commerce application, considering scalability, maintainability, and reusability.

modules.title: API Contract Testing & Advanced Validation
lessons: Error Handling & Negative Testing for APIs

video.title: Introduction to Pact for Contract Testing

scenario.title: Setting up a Consumer-Driven Contract Test

science.desc: A new microservice is being developed. Design a contract testing strategy to ensure compatibility between this new service and its consumers without requiring end-to-end tests.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can integrate automated tests seamlessly into CI/CD pipelines, manage test environments using containerization, and ensure rapid, reliable software delivery.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the guardian of continuous quality, embedding testing deeply into the development lifecycle.

modules.title: CI/CD Pipeline Fundamentals & Jenkins Deep Dive
lessons: Introduction to GitOps & Infrastructure as Code

video.title: Designing a CI/CD Pipeline for Test Automation

scenario.title: Adding a New Test Stage to an Existing Pipeline

science.desc: How would you integrate a comprehensive suite of automated API and UI tests into an existing CI/CD pipeline to provide fast feedback to developers?

modules.title: Containerization & Test Environment Management
lessons: Building Docker Images for Test Environments
Docker Compose for Multi-Container Test Setups
Managing Test Data in Containerized Environments

video.title: Introduction to Docker for Test Environments

scenario.title: Setting up a Local Microservice Test Environment
Designing a Cost-Effective Cloud Test Lab

science.desc: Your team needs to run parallel UI tests across multiple browsers and operating systems. Propose a containerization strategy using Docker and Docker Compose to achieve this efficiently.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can thoroughly test backend systems, including databases and APIs, and conduct basic performance and load testing to identify bottlenecks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are delving deeper into the system's core, ensuring its robustness and responsiveness under any condition.

scenario.title: Validating Data Persistence After API Calls
Verifying Data in a MongoDB Collection

science.desc: How would you approach testing a complex financial application where data integrity across multiple databases (SQL and NoSQL) is paramount?

modules.title: Performance Testing Basics & Load Simulation
lessons: Introduction to Performance Testing Types (Load, Stress, Spike)
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Web Applications

video.title: Creating a Basic Load Test Plan in JMeter

science.desc: A critical API endpoint is experiencing slow response times under moderate load. Outline your approach to diagnose the performance bottleneck using JMeter and system monitoring tools.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can effectively test complex distributed systems and microservices architectures, ensuring reliability, resilience, and end-to-end quality.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the art of quality in complexity, navigating the intricacies of modern distributed systems.

modules.title: Testing Microservices & Distributed Architectures
lessons: Testing Data Consistency in Distributed Systems

scenario.title: Designing an Integration Test for Microservices
Setting up a Virtual Service for a Third-Party API

science.desc: How would you ensure end-to-end data consistency and reliability in a highly distributed microservices architecture with asynchronous communication?

modules.title: Observability & Monitoring for SDET
lessons: Logging Best Practices for Test Automation
Alerting & Anomaly Detection for Test Failures

video.title: Implementing Robust Logging in Test Frameworks

scenario.title: Debugging Latency in a Multi-Service Transaction

science.desc: A critical end-to-end test is failing intermittently in the CI pipeline. Describe how you would use logging, metrics, and distributed tracing to pinpoint the exact cause of the failure in a complex microservices environment.

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can define and implement advanced quality strategies, lead SDET teams, and drive a culture of quality across the development lifecycle.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a leader and innovator, shaping the future of quality engineering and empowering teams to deliver excellence.

scenario.title: Proposing a Shift-Left Strategy for a New Project
Establishing Release Criteria for a Product

science.desc: As an SDET Lead, how would you champion a 'Quality-First' culture within a fast-paced agile development team, balancing speed with thoroughness?

modules.title: SDET Team Leadership & Mentorship
lessons: Managing Technical Debt in Test Automation

scenario.title: Resolving a Conflict within the SDET Team
Guiding a Team Member on Framework Design

science.desc: Your team is struggling with a high number of flaky UI tests. As an SDET Lead, what steps would you take to identify the root causes and implement a long-term solution?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can architect enterprise-level quality solutions, drive innovation in testing, and influence product quality at a strategic level.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a visionary, defining the future of quality engineering and ensuring robust, high-performing systems at scale.

modules.title: Enterprise QA Architecture & Future Trends
lessons: Emerging Technologies in QA (e.g., Blockchain, IoT Testing)

scenario.title: Designing a Centralized Test Reporting System

science.desc: As a Principal SDET, how would you design a future-proof quality assurance strategy for a rapidly evolving product ecosystem that incorporates AI/ML-driven testing and adapts to new technologies?
